name: incident-investigator
description: Vendor-neutral incident investigation MCP engine. Guides AI agents through evidence collection, hypothesis generation, and postmortem reporting.

interface.longDescription: Stateful MCP investigation runtime that requests evidence, builds an evidence graph, generates competing hypotheses, and produces postmortem reports. The AI assistant gathers evidence; the engine reasons over it.
defaultPrompt: Use Incident Investigator to start an investigation into why checkout failed yesterday.
Submit deployment, log, and metric evidence to the active investigation session.
Finish the investigation and summarize root cause candidates and recommendations.
